mapper.sql: select o.order_id, o.order_no, o.order_type, o.order_status, o.order_time, o.completed_time, o.customer_name, o.customer_phone, o.license_plate, o.car_model, o.service_amount, o.part_amount, o.total_amount, coalesce(b.paid_amount, o.paid_amount) as paid_amount, coalesce(b.unpaid_amount, o.unpaid_amount) as unpaid_amount, o.bookkeeping_id, b.entry_no as bookkeeping_entry_no, o.handler_name, o.del_flag, o.create_by, o.create_time, o.update_by, o.update_time, o.remark from ord_order o left join acct_bookkeeping b on b.bookkeeping_id = o.bookkeeping_id and b.del_flag = '0'
mapper.select:
o.del_flag = '0'
and o.order_no like concat('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
and o.order_type = #{orderType}
and o.order_status = #{orderStatus}
and o.customer_name like concat('%', #{customerName}, '%')
and o.license_plate like concat('%', #{licensePlate}, '%')
and date_format(o.order_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginOrderTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and date_format(o.order_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= date_format(#{params.endOrderTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
order by o.order_time desc, o.order_id desc

select detail_id, order_id, detail_type, line_no, item_name, part_id, part_code, part_name, spec_model, part_unit, quantity, unit_price, amount, reserved_quantity, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from ord_order_detail where order_id = #{orderId} order by line_no asc, detail_id asc

select o.order_no as order_no, o.order_type as order_type, o.order_status as order_status, o.customer_name as customer_name, o.customer_phone as customer_phone, o.license_plate as license_plate, o.car_model as car_model, o.order_time as order_time, o.completed_time as completed_time, d.detail_type as detail_type, d.part_code as item_code, case when d.detail_type = '1' then d.item_name else d.part_name end as item_name, d.spec_model as spec_model, d.part_unit as unit, d.quantity as quantity, d.unit_price as unit_price, d.amount as amount, coalesce(b.paid_amount, o.paid_amount) as paid_amount, coalesce(b.unpaid_amount, o.unpaid_amount) as unpaid_amount, o.handler_name as handler_name, coalesce(d.remark, o.remark) as remark from ord_order o inner join ord_order_detail d on d.order_id = o.order_id left join acct_bookkeeping b on b.bookkeeping_id = o.bookkeeping_id and b.del_flag = '0'
o.del_flag = '0'
and o.order_no like concat('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
and o.order_type = #{orderType}
and o.order_status = #{orderStatus}
and o.customer_name like concat('%', #{customerName}, '%')
and o.license_plate like concat('%', #{licensePlate}, '%')
and date_format(o.order_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginOrderTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and date_format(o.order_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= date_format(#{params.endOrderTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
order by o.order_time desc, o.order_id desc, d.line_no asc
